world.name: Classic High Fantasy
world.lore_summary: You have successfully bypassed the cultist ritual. The air is still thick with malice, but the immediate threat of detection has passed. The Silent Keep looms somewhere ahead, hidden by the ancient trees.
world.current_location: The gallery of the Silent Keep, moving toward the overlook.
world.story_notes:
CHARACTER BACKSTORY — Kel Stormblessed: Kel Stormblessed is a man in his early thirties of average height, possessing the fair skin and sharp, discerning grey eyes of his elven heritage. A jagged, silvered scar slices across his neck—a brutal souvenir from the day his village was razed and his younger sister, Syl, was stolen away. He carries himself with the quiet, rigid discipline of a soldier, his chain mail always polished and his gaze constantly scanning the horizon for any sign of disorder. Devoted to Tyr, the God of Justice, Kel operates with an uncompromising moral compass, viewing his paladinhood as a sacred duty to protect the vulnerable from the chaotic cruelty that claimed his family. Though he travels with the stoic resolve of a veteran, his heart is anchored by the persistent, unvoiced hope that he will one day track down the cultists who took Syl and finally secure the retribution she was denied.
• Character Sheet Update:
- Divine Sense: Detect celestial, fiend, or undead within 60ft.
- Lay on Hands: Pool of 5 HP; can spend 5 HP to cure disease/neutralize poison.
• Kel Stormblessed: Level 2 Paladin. HP: 15/15. AC: 11 (Defense Fighting Style). Prepared Spells: Cure Wounds, Bless. Features: Divine Smite, Divine Sense, Lay on Hands.
• Kel Stormblessed: Level 2 Paladin. HP: 15/15. AC: 12 (Defense Fighting Style). Spells Prepared: Bless, Cure Wounds. Divine Smite unlocked.
• Kel's AC calculation: Chain Mail (16) + Defense Fighting Style (1) + Shield (2) = 19. Corrected from previous session notes.
world.session_recap: You and Elara successfully bypassed the cultist ritual in the Blackwood, using the dense briars for cover while the cultists were distracted by their dark summoning. You reached the path toward the Silent Keep, now deeper within the forest where the atmosphere is even more oppressive and twisted. Elara has signaled that the Keep is only a few miles away, and you have paused to consider your approach before entering their den.

party.name: Kel Stormblessed
traits: Divine Sense — As an action, know the location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 ft (not behind total cover). Also detect consecrated/desecrated ground. Uses: CHA mod +1 per long rest.
Lay on Hands — Pool of 10 HP (5 × level). As an action, restore HP to a touched creature, or spend 5 HP to cure a disease or poison.
Fighting Style: Defense — +1 AC while wearing armor.
Spellcasting — Paladin spellcasting using CHA. Spell attack +4, Spell Save DC 12. Spell slots refresh on long rest.
Divine Smite — After a melee hit, expend a spell slot for extra radiant damage: 2d8 (L1 slot), +1d8 per slot level above 1st. +1d8 vs undead or fiends.
Divine Sense: As an action, until the end of your next turn, you know the location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 feet of you that is not behind total cover.
conditions: Concentrating on Protection from Evil and Good

inventory.name: A trophy from a fallen enemy
Bone dice or deck of cards

npcs.name: Elara
npcs.notes: A distressed laborer whose brother has gone missing near the Blackwood. She is terrified and believes there is something supernatural involved.

quests.title: The Missing Brother
quests.description: Elara's brother has gone missing in the Blackwood. She found a strange sigil on her doorstep and fears something sinister is at play.

steps.description: Investigate the Blackwood for signs of Elara's brother.
Determine the meaning of the weeping eye sigil.
